+

//

She looks human enough.. right?

+

Naz is a half Human, half Orc criminal. She's wanted in multiple cities and states with a large bounty on her head. She's a war criminal, mass murderer, bandit, thief and xenophobic to all races except orcs despite her being half human herself. Though, she doesn't hate humans as much as she hates elves

-

She wears a very expensive silver armor set that is rumoured to have belonged to a elf noble whom she 'allegedly' personally tortured to death. She has a very attractive and feminine human face which almost doesn't look right with how muscular and tall she is. And she has a somewhat calm and reasonable behaviour, until she isn't.

вӢҶЛ–вҒәвҖ§вӮҠвҳҪв—ҜвҳҫвӮҠвҖ§вҒәЛ–вӢҶ

+ Naz +
